# LimeCall — Callback Software for Business

> LimeCall is a callback software platform that connects website visitors with sales teams in 28 seconds. Trusted by 10,000+ businesses across 40+ countries. £57/mo flat rate, unlimited users.

## Core Product
- [Callback Software](https://limecall.com/customer-callback-software/)
- [AI Voice Agent](https://limecall.com/ai-voice-agent/)
- [Click to Call](https://limecall.com/click-to-call-software/)
- [Lead Routing](https://limecall.com/lead-routing-software/)
- [Call Tracking](https://limecall.com/inbound-call-tracking/)
- [Virtual Business Numbers](https://limecall.com/virtual-business-numbers/)

## Pricing
- [Pricing Plans](https://limecall.com/pricing/)

- [LimeCall vs CallPage](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-callpage/)

- [LimeCall vs RingCentral](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-ringcentral/)
- [LimeCall vs Talkdesk](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-talkdesk/)
- [LimeCall vs Twilio](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-twilio/)
- [LimeCall vs Freshdesk](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-freshdesk/)
- [LimeCall vs Vonage](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-vonage/)
- [LimeCall vs 8x8](https://limecall.com/limecall-vs-8x8/)
- [All Comparisons](https://limecall.com/compare/)
